race.description: Pamela Macdonald Aussie Mbl Broker Hcp (C2)
race.comment: BATISTA (1) has been racing well since winning first-up, flying late over 1400m to miss by 2.4L last time out. Faithfull rides now from a slightly better draw and the drop back in distance doesn't look an issue. Showing some class and he can put it all together now. BUON AMICI (3) was a touch disappointing last time after some solid efforts prior, beaten 3.4L there after having every chance. Will need some luck from the barrier, but he's on the quick turnaround and a forward showing is on the cards. TIME CONNECTION (7) will find this a little easier than what she's been racing in. Fiore hops back on board in a good push for her chances and her performance two back stacks right up in this. Can make an impression. VIRESHA (2) has to be included after closing well behind a smart one last time. ALOTTA FIGHTING (6) is knocking on the door and can't be discounted.
